summary: Completed testing of dark glassmorphism redesign. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All flows working correctly - auth page with Miron hero photo, problem selection (10 glass cards), voice selection (male/female glass cards), chat with Claude Sonnet AI response, burger menu (9 items), tariff page (4 glass cards), specialists page (Miron photos). LLM successfully switched to Claude Sonnet 4.5 via OpenRouter.

ui_bugs.issue: Send button click may be intercepted by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay - Enter key works as workaround

critical_code_review_comments: Dark glassmorphism theme properly implemented with CSS variables (--bg: #1C1C1E, --surface-glass: rgba(255,255,255,0.05))
Glassmorphism effects use backdrop-filter: blur(20px) consistently across components
Miron hero photo correctly positioned on auth page with gradient mask
Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration working via OpenRouter with Mistral fallback
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Font families (Outfit for headings, Manrope for body) properly applied
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark glassmorphism redesign verified. All features working: auth with Miron hero photo, problem selection (10 glass cards on dark bg), voice selection (male/female glass cards), chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI response (OpenRouter), TTS toggle, burger menu (9 items with dark glass panel), tariffs (4 glass cards), specialists (Miron photos). LLM changed from Mistral to Claude Sonnet 4.5 with Mistral as fallback.

auth_page.glass_form: PASS - Form has glassmorphism effect with backdrop-filter blur
auth_page.login_flow: PASS - Admin login works, redirects to /problems

llm_integration.status: WORKING - OpenRouter returning 200 OK for chat completions
